scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,gateway -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env VITE_INTERNAL_DEV=1 REXALGO_GATEWAY_PORT=8080 npm run dev -w @rexalgo/frontend
scripts.dev:gateway: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 tcp:127.0.0.1:5174 && cross-env REXALGO_GATEWAY_PORT=8080 node scripts/dev-gateway.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build -w @rexalgo/frontend && npm run build -w @rexalgo/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @rexalgo/frontend --if-present && npm run lint -w @rexalgo/backend --if-present
